name: harness-self-improvement
description: SIPS graph runtime and home-base for bounded task execution, memory, verification, delegation, and lifecycle automation.

interface.longDescription: SIPS is the home-base control plane for Claude Code, Codex, and future agent harnesses. It organizes the system around five surfaces: Control Plane status, Memory Fabric recall, Verification proof, Delegation routing, and Lifecycle Hooks. Host-specific commands, hooks, and agents stay as adapters while the SIPS MCP keeps the shared model portable.
defaultPrompt: Use $sips-proof-scanner to scan this repo's proof surfaces.
